case_title: HUNTER L. RAMANO ET AL VS. BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HUNTER L. ROMANO OR ANTHONY ROMANO. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MGMT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SHARON REARDON: CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVE BROWN, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-18-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY ROMANO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DR. HUNTER L. ROMANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVE BROWN, OWNER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $6800 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DEC-18-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. STEVE BROWN, FOR BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT FILED BY ROMANO, HUNTER L. ROMANO, ANTHONY V BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY ROMANO, HUNTER L. ROMANO, ANTHONY V AS TO DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
